steps.title: Compare the durations
steps.content: GRB 230307A lasted 200 seconds, while bursts from neutron mergers usually last fewer than 2 seconds. The blank must describe the 200-second burst as highly unusual for that type of event.

steps.title: Eliminate weak nouns
steps.content: A suggests accidental similarity, but the point is a sharp difference. B means temporary relief, and C simply means something that occurred; neither captures unusualness. The answer is D.
